messagePreview: Regulatory Radar: NordVolt AB — battery passport overdue for High-Cap Li-Ion Cell B2 (EU 2023/1542 Art. 77). Recommended fix: submit passport via EU registry portal.
Regulatory Radar: TeraPower — DC/AC Inverter Pro packaging missing capacity label (Art. 13). Update artwork before 15 Jan 2026.
Regulatory Radar: Baltic Semi — DEHP 0.18% w/w detected in MCU-8051-A, exceeds RoHS 0.1% limit. Reformulate or substitute.
Regulatory Radar: LumenCircuit — Phthalat-Konzentration im RF Control Module X4 nähert sich dem REACH-Grenzwert von 0,1%. Lieferantenerklärung aktualisieren.
